texto: Elegance is a glowing inner peace. Grace is an ability to give as well as to receive and be thankful. Mystery is a hidden laugh always ready to surface! Glamour only radiates if there is a sublime courage & bravery within: glamour is like the moon
autor: it only shines because the sun is there.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a it only shines because the sun is there.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de esforço, persistência e resultados. O trecho “Elegance is a glowing inner peace. Grace is an ability to give as well as to receive and be thank…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que coragem, c-joybell-c, reflexao pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
